creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245619
Patch for oniguruma

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers on 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
converters/php80-mbstring
converters/php81-mbstring
converters/php82-mbstring
converters/php83-mbstring
devel/git-delta
devel/py-onigurumacffi
devel/py-pyjq
lang/mosh
misc/aichat
misc/broot
misc/silicon
net-mgmt/grok_exporter
net-mgmt/seafile-server

sysutils/rust-coreutils
sysutils/rust-findutils
sysutils/vector
textproc/bat
textproc/comrak
textproc/jq
textproc/py-jq
textproc/quickwit
